prompt: In image 1, add the red “30%” discount badge from image 4 to the top-left corner of the chair image, slightly overlapping the edge. prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Add the red '30%' discount badge from image 4 to the top-left corner of the large product image (the chair), ensuring it slightly overlaps the image's top and left edges. Insert the delivery truck icon from image 3 directly below the 'ADD TO CART' button, aligning its left edge with the button's left edge, and ensure its style integrates seamlessly. Finally, place the Instagram icon from image 2 in the top-right corner of the page, positioned immediately to the left of the existing shopping cart icon. Maintain the overall layout and spacing of the original image throughout the edits.
